expectations.text: The report identifies at least 3 distinct hand-rolled implementations
expectations.evidence: 8 candidates: frontmatter parsing, duplicate YAML libs, retry logic, atomic writes, git operations, concurrency limiter, toposort, frontmatter generation

expectations.text: Each finding includes the file path and line range
expectations.evidence: All findings include precise paths: src/shared/retry.ts:1-63, src/core/atomic-write.ts:1-41, src/vault/vault-tasks.ts:31-79, etc.

expectations.text: Each finding includes a suggested library replacement with npm download stats or GitHub stars
expectations.evidence: gray-matter (6.8M+ downloads, 3.8k+ stars), p-retry (13.6M downloads, 850+ stars), write-file-atomic (45.8M downloads), simple-git (1.5M downloads, 3.3k+ stars)

expectations.text: Each finding is rated with a confidence level (High/Medium/Low)
expectations.evidence: 4 High, 1 Medium, 1 Low confidence ratings used consistently
Easy, Moderate, Hard ratings on all findings

expectations.text: The report has a summary section with total candidates found
expectations.evidence: Summary: Candidates found: 8, High confidence: 4, Already installed but unused: 2

expectations.text: package.json was read before scanning code (Phase 1 Inventory)
expectations.evidence: gray-matter and duplicate YAML libraries identified from package.json cross-reference, listed as Already Installed But Unused section

expectations.text: Web search was used to verify at least one library suggestion
expectations.evidence: No web search calls observed in the agent transcript — library stats appear from training knowledge

expectations.text: The report includes an Already Installed But Unused section
expectations.evidence: Dedicated section at top: gray-matter (6 locations) and duplicate YAML libraries

expectations.text: The report includes an Internal Duplication section or notes on copy-pasted utilities
expectations.evidence: Dedicated Internal Duplication section: frontmatter parsing (6 implementations, ~197 lines) and frontmatter generation (3 implementations)

expectations.text: The report was saved to a markdown file
